[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 100001000 2
1 000000000 a
2 000000000 a
3 001000000 1
4 000010000 1
5 100001000 2
6 001000000 1
7 000010010 2

01 10 001111010 5
12 21 100111111 7
23 32 101001111 6
34 43 111010011 6
45 54 111011111 8
56 65 111011111 8
67 76 111011100 6
70 07 111111000 6

02 20 101111111 8
13 31 101111011 7
24 42 111011111 8
35 53 111001111 7
46 64 111010110 6
57 75 111011111 8
60 06 101110100 5
71 17 111111010 7

03 30 101110011 6
14 41 011111010 6
25 52 111001111 7
36 63 101010111 6
47 74 111011010 6
50 05 111111111 a
61 16 101111110 7
72 27 111011111 8

04 40 011110010 5
15 51 111111111 a
26 62 101011111 7
37 73 111011011 7
